name: PAY_BAL_EXCEPTION_REPORTS_VL
query: SELECT PBER.BAL_EXCEPTION_REPORT_ID, PBER.REPORT_DEFINITION_ID, PBER.BASE_BAL_EXCEP_REPORT_NAME, PBERTL.BAL_EXCEP_REPORT_NAME, PBER.ENTERPRISE_ID, PBER.LEGISLATION_CODE, PBER.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, PBER.CONSOLIDATION_SET_ID, PBER.PAYROLL_ID, PBER.OUTPUT_FORMAT, PBER.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, PBER.CREATED_BY, PBER.LAST_UPDATED_BY, PBER.CREATION_DATE, PBER.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PBER.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, PBER.MODULE_ID FROM PAY_BAL_EXCEPTION_REPORTS_B PBER, PAY_BAL_EXCEPTION_REPORTS_TL PBERTL WHERE PBER.BAL_EXCEPTION_REPORT_ID = PBERTL.BAL_EXCEPTION_REPORT_ID AND PBERTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
